mapper.insert: insert into task_dispatch_attempts() values(#{attempt.dispatchAttemptId},#{attempt.taskId},#{attempt.incidentId},#{attempt.routingDecisionId},#{attempt.selectedAgentId},#{attempt.selectedGatewayNodeId},#{attempt.selectedAgentSessionId},#{attempt.selectedSiteId},#{attempt.selectedScore},#{attempt.status},#{attempt.eligibilityStatus},#{attempt.decisionReason},coalesce(cast(#{attempt.scoreBreakdownJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb),coalesce(cast(#{attempt.eligibilityFactsJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb),#{attempt.createdAt},#{attempt.updatedAt}) on conflict(dispatch_attempt_id) do update set status=excluded.status,eligibility_status=excluded.eligibility_status,decision_reason=excluded.decision_reason,score_breakdown_json=excluded.score_breakdown_json,eligibility_facts_json=excluded.eligibility_facts_json,updated_at=excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select from task_dispatch_attempts where task_id=#{taskId} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
select from task_dispatch_attempts order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
